author: Eric S.
pros: We liked that Assembled had all the integrations we were looking for and the features our business needed without being overly complicated or requiring a long commitment to get it up and running. Within a little more than a week our team had the platform fully configured and onboarded all of our 200+ agents and have had little problems ever since. Their support staff is very knowledgeable and fast to respond whenever we have questions and the relationship with the Assembled team has been very good since implementation.
cons: Could use some more granularity options with the forecasting features and would also like to see better support for outbound calling. Although, everything else has been excellent.

description: yeah good, way better than the previous rota tool we are using makes customising the rota super simple
author: Leon M.
pros: Easy to use and works well with other apps (slack and google meets) allowing me to update the team and make changes across the board
cons: I would like the option to select muliple individual members of the team so I can compare their rotas and make changes without having to see the non-relevant members

author: Liz G.
pros: honestly nothing I do not like using it, and will use 5/9 whenever possible cause the reporting in 5/9 is much better
cons: the visualization, the way it is so bulky, and the fact that as a manager I have to decipher the data insteap of being able to get a snapshot is quite a turn off.

description: It has been a great product. The staff have been very cooperative in listening to our needs as a company and updating the kinks.
author: Dawn N.
pros: The overall product seems to be great. There are some bugs to work on directly with what our company needs, but they have been very helpful in working to get what we need fixed.
cons: There are some issues with adding events that we are working with getting fixed. They have been very helpful in working with the issues we are coming across to get resolved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The team we worked with was super responsive to everything we brought to them in a quick fashion. I hope that kind of service is the standard for Assembled.
author: Amanda L.
pros: It makes adding things fast and efficient, I appreciate how smoothly data is entered. The product loads quickly and has not crashed unlike our former product.
cons: There are bugs and issues that your team has worked diligently to work out every time my team finds them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rachel C.
pros: There are so many great features about Assembled: the ability to display multiple time zones, templates, how easily you can move a member to a different team. As the person that creates the schedule for my team, these features have made scheduling so much easier compared to other WFM tools that we have used previously.
cons: I've noticed glitches from time to time with the dates of time off requests. It would be nice if a time off request is canceled that the base activity or previous tasks could be restored. While the time off requests overview is great, what could make it better is the ability to view both pending and approved requests at the same time.

review_title: User friendly program for managers and associates alike!
description: Streamlined scheduling between channels, office sites and skill/associate level, including WFH and PTO.
author: Molly G.
pros: I love the ease of use - It is helpful in sorting by location, level or "skill", channel and more! It helps my Leads maintain coverage across our channels seamlessly, reallocate bandwidth, and share out schedules. It also helps us project for volume against coverage and easily factor in PTO to daily coverage. The integration with Slack is key for our associates who are able to check who else is staffed alongside them on live channels and coordinate accordingly.
cons: As a newer platform, it is not completely built out to the level of capabilities that some older brands might be (comes with time!) but they are very agile and adaptable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good, but can be better. The team performance tab often fails to display the actual metrics. There is too much information, but at the same time, the definitions of the metrics are not easy to understand
author: Pamela C.
pros: It contains a lot of information and gadgets to track the agent's performance, it makes the tracking easier
cons: Does not have live monitoring, and the team performance tracker often crashes. Some settings are stuck and can't be changed without admin permissions, making it difficult to use

author: Aya C.
pros: Employee Tracking, very user-friendly and easy tracking especially for WFM team, the extracted reports are also efficient.
cons: The filters. WFM team have to deselect multiple entries. e.g site. It would be faster for us if the filters only works for 1 selection per filter. It may look hassle, but it'll give more accurate and less bug in our real-time analysis.

description: Overall, assembled features are improving unlike before that we are having challenges but looking forward to more added features.
author: Jennveve A.
pros: In the staffing timeline, we can now have multiple selection unlike before that we can only select one.
cons: In heatmaps, hopefully it will also be an added feature that we can have multiple selection. Currently, we only have the option to choose one.

review_title: User-Friendly Scheduling with Exciting Future Potential
description: Good, may have more flexibility in future with different packages once other features are available. Gets the job done.
author: Julia P.
pros: Ease of creating schedules, user-friendly, not over complicated. Excited for the new upcoming features recently discussed like schedule generator, on the right path with features that will be beneficial to the user.
cons: Run into tech or bug issues where we need intervention to continue. The colors of the schedule randomly change without notice. Would like more integration options with other payroll companies.

description: It's been a life safer. I can track my teams improvements and figure out where they need to adjust their time productively
author: Merrilee R.
pros: Being able to make sure staffing is where it needs to be. Also tracking my teams SLA's for the year
cons: Getting use to the navigation. I'm sure once I've worked in a for little longer I will feel more comfortable with it.

description: Personally I find that Assembled's customer support offer exceptional service, prompt replies and timely follow ups.
author: Andreea S.
pros: Assembled is a very user-friendly platform. I love how easy it is to create schedules using the Templates feature.The Real time feature gives us an insight into adherence and performance, and it's handy for monitoring.The reports offered are complex.Love how Assembled is hosting workshops about the platform's features - it helps a lot to learn more and see different perspectives from people.I've been using Assembled for our CX team for 2 years, and I've witnessed their growth and commitment to better themselves with every feedback from their users.
cons: I don't mainly use the time off feature as it's not linked with our HR platform, so it creates an extra step for the team, but that's just a process preference.

description: Overall its very good, I know that the Assembled team continues to work on improvements. Also collaborating with my company to make things better.
author: Ernesto C.
pros: Easy to use like Staffing(scheduling) to make real time changes. It provides a time stamp and a person who was last touched. Also can review the historical editing. Template is a big help when creating a team schedule with a specific range.
cons: Gathering data like actual volume and adherence there are some delays, some times it also does not sync to other tools that we are using. When running a template, if you manual inputs can't be override.

description: We have saved hundreds of thousands of dollars by scaling our teams with Assembled. As the WFM, it has allowed me to impact more teams. We are seeing fewer schedule adherence misses and are able to monitor in real time. Significantly reduced reporting time.
author: Conner C.
pros: Great user interface, easy to use, easy to implement, amazing customer service, great reporting package.
cons: Assembled would be more competitive if they offered more integrations.

review_title: Game Changer For Our CX Team!
description: Assembled has played an integral role in helping our CX team scale from ~20 to 100+, and it's hard to believe we were working off of google sheets before using this tool. The Assembled team is a joy to work with, and I hope to continue using the tool for many years. It's still early days for the platform but they've already released many new features/functionalities in the 1 year we've used the tool, so I can't wait for what's to come.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Assembled easily provides our agents visibility on what channels they're staffed to each day and when their breaks are, and team leads can easily make changes to schedules if needed.
cons: I wish there were an option for changes to be auto-saved! The Assembled team did give a heads-up that clicking the save button was needed to lock in change, but I still overlooked it a few times at first — it's a bit hidden!

description: I can easily check reports and filter my team. It's very helpful you can always reference assembled when managing attendance and adherence scores of the team.
author: Adonis B.
pros: The options where you can access the reports. You can also view individual schedule.
cons: I like everything in Assembled, though it's a bit new to me, but I can easily understand the tool.

description: It was really a helpful app where all the wfm needs are met accordingly with an easy use of the app and understandable if there is an update.
author: Michael Kevin A.
pros: Easy and fast phased application and as well as straight forward.
cons: A bit glitchy and sometimes, real time updates are not reflecting right away where we have to refresh the app for quite some time to see the realtime updates or even the sc hedule requests that has to be approved on our end.

description: The main benefit I get from Assembled is the ability for the whole team to have visibility on who's doing what and when. It makes it super easy for keeping the whole team organised.
author: Andrew S.
pros: The software is really easy to use, looks great and doesn't disrupt our support agents. It fits in seamlessly with their day-to-day operations, which is a game changer.
cons: It would be good to be able to choose which days you can see, rather than being limited to specific weeks, but the team are receptive to feedback and this has already been taken on board!

description: Better, smarter staffing and less overall downtime for agents.
author: Lester B.
pros: I like how flexible Assembled is, allowing me to adjust activities and schedules on the go and see the impact this has.
cons: Sometimes the year over year forecasting is lacking, not allowing to customer to specific business needs that may vary by the week or month of the year.

description: Overall, I would say I have the best experience with Assembled.
author: Ritziel L.
pros: What I like the most about the software is the scheduling and reporting features which it helps with my day-to-day role.
cons: I find difficult with the real-time tab sometimes because of the status not syncing properly.

description: We're using it to task our agents with hourly task. It has been very helpful for our entire team to see what everyone is doing and ot prep them for the coming hours.
author: Zach G.
pros: Ability to see an overview of hourly tasks by agent.
cons: When needing to edit a task i.e change the text that has been input, it's kind of sensitive. If you don't edit it the correct way, it closes out of the popup and doesn't save what information you've input. I I also don't like not being able to move tasks up and down on the schedule.

description: goodjob im eevrything it makes easy for us compared to other tools i have used before
author: Soonam M.
pros: i like how it is user friendly to the user and how it affect our work in timeliness when looking for something
cons: none so far i like everything with assembled

author: samantha D.
pros: Trying to manage a customer service department with several teams, different time zones and priorities can be difficult. Assembled helps with scheduling and projections to make sure we have coverage in all areas.
cons: I haven't found any aspects that I don't like about Assembled yet.

author: Valeria O.
pros: I love the features that Assemble has. The Reports section as well is very helpful.
cons: There are moments that assemble might glitch.
